UPCOMING BOOT CAMPS

July 1998
Journalism & Newsroom

IRE and NICAR are offering upcoming boot camp training programs in Columbia, Missouri in fall 1998 and spring 1999, with both condensed and full-length options available for investigative journalists.

UPCOMING BOOT CAMPS:

OCTOBER 22-25, 1998 - POWER BOOT CAMP IN COLUMBIA, Mo. (A BASIC BOOT CAMP SQUEEZING SIX DAYS OF TRAINING INTO FOUR.)

JANUARY 3-8, 1999 - BASIC BOOT CAMP IN COLUMBIA, Mo.

MAY 16-21, 1999 - BASIC BOOT CAMP IN COLUMBIA, Mo.

FOR A COMPLETE LISTING OF UPCOMING IRE AND NICAR EVENTS, INCLUDING BOOT CAMPS, ON-THE-ROAD TRAINING, SEMINARS, AND REGIONAL CONFERENCES, VISIT OUR WEB SITE AT WWW.IRE.ORG/CALENDAR.HTML
